level.setting: The decaying Catacombs of the Cinder King

pickup.name: Ancient Oil
pickup.effect: Doubles the burning damage of the Inferno Staff

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Frost Shade dissolves the magically locked obsidian gate leading to the sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Crumbling stone pillars falling from the ceiling

pickup.name: Sacred Ember
pickup.effect: Provides moderate health regeneration over time

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's collapse activates the ritual seals and summons the bridge to the inner throne room.

pickup.name: Cinder Core
pickup.effect: Massive damage modifier against the final boss

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's dissipation drops the final barrier protecting the Cinder King's chamber.

boss.name: Cinder King
boss.victory_condition: Successfully infuse the Cinder Core into the boss to extinguish his dark flame.

level.objective: Purify the tomb of the Cinder King to stop the spreading corruption.
level.reward: The Eternal Flame title and access to the forbidden pyromancy archives.

pickup.name: Honey Pot
pickup.effect: Restores 5 health and acts as a distraction for water-based creatures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite clears the barrier to the Sunlit Creek

pickup.name: Enchanted Whistle
pickup.effect: Summons protective songbirds that cause sonic disruption to shadow-aligned foes

encounters.trigger: Calming the Kelpie reveals the hidden entrance to the Rooted Cave

pickup.name: Glowing Crystal
pickup.effect: Emits a brilliant light that weakens the Thorn King's magical defense

encounters.trigger: Using the crystal to dispel the darkness activates the portal to the Boss Chamber

boss.name: The Thorn King
boss.victory_condition: Use the light from the Glowing Crystal to reveal his true form and finish him with the staff

level.reward: Mastery of the forest animals and the title of Forest Warden

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry clears the debris blocking the path to the main altar
Ringing the bell reveals the hidden entrance to the crypts
Destroying the armor causes the stone seal to the boss sanctum to shatter

boss.name: Abyssal Inquisitor
boss.victory_condition: Purify the soul core within the inquisitor

level.objective: Purify the corrupted cathedral and reclaim the light

level.setting: An ancient, shifting labyrinth beneath a cursed temple

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Echo reveals a locked door requiring the Mirror Fragment
The Specter's collapse triggers the activation of the ancient inner sanctum seal

pickup.name: Void Core
pickup.effect: Neutralizes the boss's defensive illusion field

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's defeat causes the Void Core to hum, forcing the boss to manifest

boss.name: Master of Illusions
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Master's mask while the Void Core is active

level.objective: Escape the shifting catacombs by defeating the Master of Illusions

level.setting: An ancient, moonlit grove known as the Silent Sanctuary

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite clears the thorny vines and reveals the path to the Clear Stream.
Defeating the strider unlocks the hidden stepping stones leading to the Inner Glade.

pickup.name: Warden's Blessing
pickup.effect: Provides total restoration and spiritual purification

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem causes the stone gate protecting the Twilight Guardian to swing open.

boss.name: The Twilight Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Use the Warden's Blessing to cleanse the corruption and pacify the Guardian.

level.objective: Restore the tranquility of the ancient forest by purifying the corrupted Guardian.
level.reward: The title of Keeper of the Glade and the eternal gratitude of the forest spirits.

encounters.trigger: defeating the stalker opens the rift to the molten bridge
the golem's death stabilizes the bridge leading to the throne room

pickup.name: chronos key
pickup.effect: briefly halts time for the final boss encounter

encounters.trigger: the knight's demise reveals the gateway to the boss arena

boss.name: the entropy weaver
boss.victory_condition: destroy the weaver's heart core while it is immobilized by the chronos key

level.objective: restore balance to the fractured realm before the void consumes everything

encounters.trigger: The tolling of the Cursed Bell upon the Sentry's defeat awakens the guardians of the Inner Crypt.

pickup.name: Essence of Void
pickup.effect: Allows the user to phase through corporeal matter

encounters.trigger: Shattering the floor during combat reveals a secret passage leading to the Altar of Bone.

pickup.name: Obsidian Eye
pickup.effect: Reveals the true structural flaws of ancient horrors

encounters.trigger: The spirit's dissipation causes the Altar to pulsate, signaling the arrival of the Lich King.

boss.name: Lich King Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Use the Obsidian Eye to shatter the Lich King's physical phylactery

level.objective: Purify the necropolis by destroying the Lich King and his phylactery

level.setting: The Ashwood Wastes, a realm consumed by eternal twilight and necro-blight.

pickup.name: Moonlight Oil
pickup.effect: Imbues arrows with lunar energy, effective against ethereal shadows

encounters.trigger: Slaying the beast causes the poison fog to dissipate, revealing a path to the Sunken Ruins

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Shard
pickup.effect: Concentrates solar energy into a high-intensity burst

encounters.trigger: The death of the ghoul triggers a mechanism that lowers the drawbridge to the Silent Bridge

encounters.hazard: Razor-sharp obsidian shards raining from the sky

pickup.name: Heart of the Wastes
pickup.effect: A relic that binds the essence of the corruption to the wielder

encounters.trigger: The fallen knight drops a key that unlocks the massive iron gates to the Boss sanctum

boss.name: The Void Blight
boss.victory_condition: Deploy the Ancient Sun-Shard to shatter the Boss's shielding before delivering the final strike

level.objective: Purify the Ashwood Wastes by defeating the source of the decay.
level.reward: The Eternal Bow of the Ranger, a weapon capable of firing spectral arrows that never miss their mark.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the droid causes an electrical short that unlocks the bulkhead to the mainframe.
Destroying the sentry triggers a fire suppression sequence that opens the path to the reactor core.
Disabling the drone engages the emergency lockdown release, revealing the boss chamber.

boss.name: System Overlord Unit
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Access Keycard into the main console to trigger an emergency core purge while the boss is stunned.

level.objective: Restore station stability by purging the rogue AI from the command bridge.
level.reward: Station Commander Clearance Badge and salvaged high-grade reactor components.

level.setting: The derelict space station Aegis-7 orbiting a dying star

encounters.trigger: Opening the main terminal initiates the vent failure and powers up the drone.
Clearing the cryo-bay allows passage through the blast doors to the engineering deck.
Securing the Engineering Deck alerts the Wraith protecting the bridge entrance.

boss.name: Chrono-Lich AI
boss.victory_condition: Overload the AI processor using the Chrono-Stabilizer

level.objective: Restart the ship's reactor core to prevent terminal orbit decay

level.setting: a crumbling orbital research station experiencing catastrophic gravity failures

enemy.name: Rogue Maintenance Droid
enemy.weakness: Charged Lightning Staff due to exposed conductive circuitry

pickup.name: Insulated Battery Pack
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to electrical grounding effects

encounters.trigger: The droid death explosion short-circuits the door locks to the ventilation shafts

enemy.name: Security Crawler
enemy.weakness: Insulated Battery Pack which causes the crawler's radar to malfunction and loop

pickup.name: Focused Ion Lens
pickup.effect: Condenses lightning attacks into armor-piercing bolts

encounters.trigger: The crawler's destroyed EMP core blast clears the debris blocking the Hangar elevator

enemy.name: Enforcer Mech
enemy.weakness: Focused Ion Lens capable of penetrating the mech's reinforced plating

pickup.name: Command Override Key
pickup.effect: Grants access to the main station core containment room

encounters.trigger: The mech drops the override key required to engage the boss room airlock

boss.name: Overseer Prime
boss.weakness: Insulated Battery Pack to ground its massive electrical shield during vulnerability phases
boss.victory_condition: Deactivate the core containment field by draining the boss's shields with the Insulated Battery Pack

level.objective: Stabilize the station reactor before it enters uncontrolled atmospheric reentry

level.setting: The decaying interior of an abandoned Dyson Sphere

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone de-pressurizes the room and unlocks the blast door to the Power Core
Disabling the prowler reveals a zero-gravity path leading to the Command Hub

pickup.name: Neural Override Key
pickup.effect: Allows direct manipulation of the boss's defensive shields

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry lowers the security barriers leading to the Central Reactor

boss.name: Overseer Prime
boss.victory_condition: Successfully bypass the security protocols to overload the reactor core

level.objective: Restore power to the Dyson Sphere systems
level.reward: Ancient navigation data and total control over the Dyson Sphere

encounters.trigger: Defeating the swarm deactivates the cooling locks to the main reactor
Destroying the sentry triggers the emergency purging of the core
Securing the key stabilizes the bridge and opens the gate to the Sanctum

boss.name: The Singularity Overseer
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss shielding and execute a finishing Shadow Strike

level.objective: Disable the Dyson Sphere control matrix to prevent planetary consumption

encounters.trigger: the drone's destruction vents the station and draws the player toward the med-bay
the assistant's death forces an emergency override of the station's central core
destroying the core releases the magnetic seal to the bridge boss chamber

boss.name: the singularity construct
boss.victory_condition: overload the singularity core using the battery to stabilize the station

level.objective: purge the corrupted ai and restore station gravity systems

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot drops a Golden Ticket which unlocks the Funhouse gate
Equipping the lens reveals the secret door to the Vending Unit room
Inserting the keychip into the main terminal summons the Carnival Director

boss.name: Mecha-Ringmaster
boss.victory_condition: Overload his central processor with the Keychip

level.objective: Shut down the rogue Carnival AI to stop the chaotic energy drain

level.setting: The crystalline spire of Aethelgard floating in a quiet nebula

pickup.name: Gravitic Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Stabilizes shifting terrain and provides gravitational grounding

encounters.trigger: Dispersing the swarm reveals the maintenance gate to the Spire Core
Defeating the construct unlocks the heavy-light bridge leading to the Astral Peak

pickup.name: Cosmic Resonance Key
pickup.effect: Harmonizes with high-level energetic structures to unlock the Boss Chamber

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel activates the ley-line mechanism required to open the Boss Chamber

boss.name: Nebular Architect
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Architect's central processor by embedding the Resonance Key into its core

level.objective: Stabilize the collapsing star-spire and restore cosmic harmony
level.reward: Mastery over local spatial geometry and the title of Spire Warden
